name: 100 MG Vildagliptin Sustained Release Tablets
about: 100 MG Vildagliptin Sustained Release Tablets are a type of general medicine used to treat diabetes mellitus type 2. This medication helps to control blood sugar levels by regulating the production and release of insulin in the body. The tablets are made in India and come in a solid form that should be stored in a dry place. The sustained release formula ensures a steady supply of medication over time, making it easier to manage diabetes symptoms. The dosage of each tablet is 100 MG, which should be taken as directed by a healthcare professional.

faq.q: What is the purpose of 100 MG Vildagliptin Sustained Release Tablets?
faq.a: These tablets are used to treat diabetes mellitus type 2 by controlling blood sugar levels.

faq.q: What is the dosage of each tablet?
faq.a: Each tablet contains 100 MG of medication.

faq.q: How should I store these tablets?
faq.a: These tablets should be stored in a dry place.

faq.q: What is the physical form of these tablets?
faq.a: These tablets come in a solid form.

faq.q: What type of medicine is this?
faq.a: This is a type of general medicine used to manage diabetes symptoms.
